attributes.action: Save A-Level Chemistry at Lliswerry High School
attributes.additional_details: A-Level chemistry has been cancelled at Lliswerry High School last minute, forcing many students to change their plans, and waste revision time on travelling to other schools across the city. Teachers and students were blindsided, and it is harming the education of many young STEM students.
attributes.background: Reinstate A-Level chemistry at Lliswerry High School.

rejection.details:
This is a local matter for the school concerned. Education is anyway devolved in Wales. You may wish to see whether you can start a petition at the Senedd petitions website:
https://petitions.senedd.wales/
